title: manilkara bidentata subsp. bidentata
intro: Manilkara bidentata subsp. bidentata, also known as the African star apple or Udara, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its small, star-shaped fruits and large, evergreen leaves. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Manilkara bidentata subsp. bidentata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its leaves and fruits are also used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and ointments.
